name: @cartago-git/web
description: Product/documentation site for @cartago-git/mcp-core, generated from the live tool registry (tools + capabilities.json stay in sync with the code).

scripts.build: bun scripts/check-i18n.ts && bun scripts/gen-capabilities.ts && astro build
scripts.build:strict: bun scripts/check-i18n.ts && bun scripts/gen-capabilities.ts --strict && astro build
